title: Senior Teacher - IIT Bombay - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - IIT Bombay - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
IIT Bombay, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Agra operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIT Bombay:
IIT Bombay is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIT Bombay!
